arts.ttl: “Not afraid” – Real Sociedad star on Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur
arts.sum: Manchester United or Tottenham Hotspur will be heading to San Sebastian next month, as Real Sociedad made it through to the last 16 of the Europa League. Imanol Alguacil’s side defeated FC Midtjylland 5-2 in the second leg of their play-off round tie on Thursday, which ensured a 7-3 aggregate victory. It was a bizarre […] The post “Not afraid” – Real Sociedad star on Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur appeared first on Football España.
